title: Hulk, Punisher join Peter Parker in Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer
summary: Spider-Man: Brand New Day brings together heroes Hulk and Punisher alongside Peter Parker in a new trailer. The film features lighthearted interaction between the characters, suggesting a comedic tone.
content: Peter Parker to Bruce Banner: "I didn't know you could get that big."

zh.title: 绿巨人和惩罚者加入《蜘蛛侠:全新开始》预告中的彼得·帕克
zh.summary: 《蜘蛛侠:全新开始》将绿巨人和惩罚者等英雄与彼得·帕克汇聚一堂,推出了一支新预告片。这部电影展现了角色之间轻松诙谐的互动,暗示了喜剧基调。

title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX
summary: NASA has selected Relativity Space, acquired by former Google executive Eric Schmidt, for a Mars mission in competition with SpaceX. The selection is notable given Relativity's previous struggles to reach orbit.
content: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.

zh.title: NASA选定埃里克·施密特的火箭公司执行火星任务,与SpaceX展开竞争
zh.summary: NASA已选定由前谷歌高管埃里克·施密特收购的相对论太空公司(Relativity Space)执行火星任务,与SpaceX竞争。鉴于相对论太空公司之前难以进入轨道,这一选择值得关注。

title: Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans
summary: Midjourney is expanding into hardware with "The Midjourney Scanner," an ultrasound-based full-body health imaging device that CEO David Holz plans to integrate into a San Francisco spa. The device aims to provide MRI-quality imaging for regular health monitoring.
content:
“A scan of an imaging phantom, segmented to validate how cleanly structures separate under controlled conditions.“ | Image: Midjourney Medical	

Midjourney CEO David Holz just showed off the company's first hardware product and plans to build a San Francisco spa, which he admitted is a bit different from the "cat pictures" produced by its AI image generator. Dubbed The Midjourney Scanner, it's an ultrasound-based full-body scanner that uses a ring of sensors to capture vertical slices of the inside of your body, looking at the composition of your muscle, fat, bone, and organs to start. Holz said ideally, you could do this once a year or every single day, as it "aims for image quality comparable to MRI in many ways."
He mentioned that one way he'd like to use it would be to see how h …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Midjourney从生成猫咪图像发展到全身超声波扫描
zh.summary: Midjourney正在扩展到硬件领域,推出"Midjourney扫描仪",这是一款基于超声波的全身健康成像设备,CEO大卫·霍尔茨计划将其集成到旧金山的一家水疗中心。该设备旨在为定期健康监测提供MRI质量的成像。

title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
summary: Google Docs users can disable the Gemini AI features that generate unwanted "write with Gemini" pop-ups in the application. This how-to guide provides steps for opting out of AI writing assistance.
content: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

zh.title: 如何在Google Docs中关闭AI
zh.summary: Google Docs用户可以禁用生成不需要的"用Gemini写作"弹出窗口的Gemini AI功能。这份操作指南提供了选择退出AI写作辅助的步骤。
